zh.Great Bromley, Essex, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布羅姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Hewitt於1484年出生在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布羅姆利時，她的父親John Hewitt24歲，母親Joan Harding16歲。她於大約1500年與David Stone在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年7月3日在她的家鄉享年98歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿布其 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯 龐特尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Hewitt于1484年出生在英国英格兰艾可格亞特 布羅姆利时，她的父亲John Hewitt24岁，母亲Joan Harding16岁。她于大约1500年与David Stone在英国结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年7月3日在她的家乡享年98岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿布其 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯 龐特尼。

nameMeanings.name: Hewitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:

from the Middle English personal name Hewet, Huet, Hughet, Howet, pet forms of Hugh (Middle English Hewe, Hue; see Hugh and compare Hew ). The spelling Hughet stood for both Huet and the synonymous Huget; see Huggett . This surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

habitational name from Hewitts in Chelsfield or Hewitts in Willesborough (both Kent), both named from Old English hīewett ‘cutting’, denoting a place where trees had been cut down. Here there lived families called de la Hewatte (1270), de la hewett (1301), and atte Hewete (1338). The name may also be topographic for someone who lived in a newly made clearing in a wood.

variants.name: Howatt
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Hewitt  .

variants.name: Hewatt
meanings: English: variant of   Hewitt  .

variants.name: Hewitson
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the personal name Hewet; see Hewitt .

variants.name: Howett
meanings: English (East Midlands): variant of   Hewitt  .

variants.name: Huett
meanings: English (Somerset): variant of   Hewitt  .
German (Hütt): status name for someone living in a hut or owning a small shop, Middle High German hütte, or a habitational name from any of several places called Hütt or Hütte. Compare Hutt .

variants.name: Hewett
meanings: English: variant of   Hewitt  .

variants.name: Howat
meanings: Scottish (southwestern): variant of   Hewitt  .

variants.name: Howitt
meanings: English (East Midlands): variant of   Hewitt  .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

variants.name: Huet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre.
English: variant of   Hewitt  .
French: from a pet form of the personal name   Hue   ‘Hugh’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Hewitt was born in 1484, in Great Bromley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hewitt, was 24 and her mother, Joan Harding, was 16. She married David Stone about 1500, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 July 1582, in her hometown, at the age of 98, and was buried in St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Hewitt est née en 1484, à Great Bromley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hewitt, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Harding, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé David Stone environ 1500, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1582, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1500 in England David Stone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1582 im Alter von 98 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Hewitt è nata il nel 1484 nel Great Bromley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Hewitt, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan Harding, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato David Stone circa 1500, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1582, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Hewittが1484年にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ブロムリーで生まれた時，父John Hewittは24歳，母Joan Hardingは16歳であった。約1500年にイギリスでDavid Stoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年7月3日に故郷で98歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト マリー アブチャーチ ウィス スト ラウレンス ポウントニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kirby-le-Soken, Essex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 커비 일 소켄
ko.St Mary Abchurch, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 압c후르치 위스 스트 로렌스 파우트니
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Hewitt(이)가 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hewitt(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Harding(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 영국에서 David Stone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 7월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 압c후르치 위스 스트 로렌스 파우트니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Hewitt nasceu em 1484, em Great Bromley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hewitt, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Harding, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com David Stone aproximadamente 1500, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1582, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Kirby-le-Soken, Essex, England: кирби л сокен, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St Mary Abchurch, London, England: ст мэри абчурч вит ст ларенс поунтни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Hewitt родилась в 1484 г. в местности грит бромли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hewitt было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Harding, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Stone около 1500 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 июля 1582 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 98 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри абчурч вит ст ларенс поунтни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Hewitt nació en 1484, en Great Bromley, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hewitt, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Harding, tenía 16 años. Se casó con David Stone aproximadamente 1500, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1582, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
